fields.label: Room / Zone
fields.description: Optional. Populated for schemas that include zone grouping (trade_boq, roomwise_boq). Leave blank for schemas that do not use zones.

fields.label: Amount
fields.description: Always computed as qty × rate in Python. The model total is never used directly.

fields.label: Type
fields.description: Optional. Required only when the profile has Require Material/Service Split enabled.

fields.label: AI Confidence
fields.description: Confidence score returned by the AI (0.0–1.0). Items below the profile threshold are flagged.

fields.label: Status
fields.options:
Valid
Needs Review
Missing Rate
Missing Quantity
Schema Error
fields.description: Set automatically based on profile validation rules. Valid = passed all checks. Needs Review = low confidence or missing optional fields. Missing Rate / Missing Quantity = required commercial data absent. Schema Error = a mandatory profile rule was violated.

fields.label: Extra Metadata
fields.description: Stores schema-specific fields that do not fit the standard columns (e.g. drawing_reference, finish, trade for shop drawing or trade BOQ schemas).
